title: Item Economy
description: A simple plugin for Spigot which adds /ie command to take/give items you specified in config. Now you can make economy with any item you want!
body:
ItemEconomy is a simple plugin for Spigot that adds a `/ie` command to pick up/drop off items you specify in the config. Now you can create an economy with any item you want!

### Key Features

- Ability to take items from inventory to vault (`/ie take`)
- Ability to give items to inventory from storage (`/ie give`)
- Localization (Russian and English only)

### Great example for you

I made this plugin because I wanted to make a diamond economy on my server. Players can take their diamonds to their vaults and take diamonds from those vaults. So I thought it would be cool if I made the same plugin for everyone! Enjoy!

Dependencies:
- Spigot
- [Vault](https://github.com/milkbowl/Vault)
- [BetterEconomy](https://github.com/HSGamer/BetterEconomy/)
